chunks.title: Blessings for Obedience
chunks.reason: A cohesive unit describing the comprehensive blessings promised to Israel for keeping God's commandments.

chunks.title: The Curses of Disobedience
chunks.reason: A detailed enumeration of specific curses and calamities that will befall the people if they fail to listen to God.

chunks.title: Consequences and Exile
chunks.reason: A concluding section explaining the cause of the curses, detailing the siege, and describing the final exile to Egypt.
